g.title: action.emergency_closing_circulation:emergency_closing->action.emergency_closing:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (emergency_closing) REFERENCES action.emergency_closing(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.emergency_closing_circulation:circulation->action.circulation:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (circulation) REFERENCES action.circulation(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
